scripts.build: pnpm --filter @floatboat/nexus-core build && pnpm --filter @floatboat/nexus-react build && pnpm --filter @floatboat/nexus-vue build && pnpm --filter @floatboat/nexus-preset-gfm build && pnpm --filter @floatboat/nexus-plugin-slash build && pnpm --filter @floatboat/nexus-plugin-history build && pnpm --filter @floatboat/nexus-plugin-search build && pnpm --filter @floatboat/nexus-plugin-toolbar build && pnpm --filter @floatboat/nexus-plugin-math build && pnpm --filter @floatboat/nexus-plugin-vim build && pnpm --filter @floatboat/nexus-plugin-wordcount build
